title: Agreement
description:
A standalone JACS agreement document for verifiable consent to terms. The JACS header owns document identity, versioning, authorship signatures, registration, files, hashes, and visibility. This schema adds agreement-specific terms, parties, policy, consent signatures, signed relationship links, and edit-authority controllers. Transcript is an external append-only log, referenced by id.

Signature binding rules: each agreement signature is a standard JACS signature whose inner preimage is the parent document's jacsAgreementHash. When transcriptLogRef is present, each signature additionally binds signedTranscriptHash. Each agreement link's signature binds its signedLinkHash. The agentId, agentVersion, signing timestamp, and signed-version are recorded inside the JACS signature object itself; the schema does not duplicate them on the outer wrapper.

SDK invariant: transcriptLogRef is set-once at agreement creation and immutable in all successor versions.

jacsAgreementHash.description: Stable hash of the agreement consent scope. SDKs compute this over: title, description, terms, termsFormat, parties, signaturePolicy, and transcriptLogRef. NOT over: currentTranscriptHash, agreementSignatures, links, controllers, or any header field. Appending agreementSignatures, adding links, or growing the external transcript log must not change this hash; swapping transcriptLogRef MUST change it.

terms.description: The agreement text the signer parties consent to. Plain text or Markdown for MVP.

agreementSignatures.description: Consent and attestation signatures over the agreement. Each entry is a JACS signature binding jacsAgreementHash (and signedTranscriptHash if transcript is present). The signing agent identity and timestamp are inside the JACS signature object.

transcriptLogRef.description: jacsId of an external append-only JACS document that holds this agreement's transcript. Set once at agreement creation; immutable thereafter. Included in jacsAgreementHash — swapping the log ref invalidates prior signatures.

currentTranscriptHash.description: Optional non-binding checkpoint of the transcript log hash at the time this agreement version was emitted. NOT part of jacsAgreementHash. Verifiers compute the authoritative current hash from the external log.

links.description: Signed relationship links to other agreements. Each link self-signs via signedLinkHash. Links are NOT in jacsAgreementHash — adding a supersedes/amends link does not invalidate prior agreement signatures.

controllers.description: Agent IDs authorized to propose successor versions, append to the transcript log, change status, or modify parties. Edit authority — distinct from parties (who is bound) and jacsVisibility (who can read).

party.description: A participant in an agreement. Signer-role parties consent and are bound. Witness-role parties attest but are not bound. Observer-role parties are listed without consent or attestation.

delegatedBy.description: Optional: agent id on whose behalf this party signs. Proof of authority lives in agreementSignature.delegationChain.

signaturePolicy.description: Rules for when the agreement is considered complete.

partyQuorum.description: Signer-party consent threshold. 'all' = every signer-role party; 'majority' = more than half; integer N = at least N signer-role party signatures.

witnessRequired.description: Minimum witness-role party signatures required in addition to signer quorum. Witnesses do not count toward partyQuorum.

timeout.description: ISO 8601 deadline after which new signatures are not accepted.

agreementSignature.description: A JACS signature over the agreement. The inner signature object binds jacsAgreementHash (and signedTranscriptHash when transcriptLogRef is present) and carries the signer's agent identity and timestamp. The outer wrapper carries only what the JACS signature cannot: the agreement-specific role, the transcript snapshot, and an optional delegation chain.

role.description: Signer signatures count toward partyQuorum; witness signatures count toward witnessRequired.

signedTranscriptHash.description: Transcript log hash visible to the signer at signing time. REQUIRED when transcriptLogRef is present on the agreement (enforced operationally). Provides the tamper-evidence anchor: if transcript entries are later removed or modified, this hash will no longer match the recomputed log state.

delegationChain.description: If signing on behalf of a party, ordered list of signed JACS delegation document references proving authority.

jacsDocumentRef.description: Verifiable reference to a specific signed JACS document version.

agreementLink.description: Signed relationship from this agreement to another JACS document. The inner JACS signature binds signedLinkHash and carries the signer's identity and timestamp.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason. Included in signedLinkHash.

signedLinkHash.description: Hash that this link's signature binds. Computed over: rel, target (jacsId + jacsVersion + jacsSha256), reason (if present), and the SOURCE agreement's jacsId. Prevents copy-paste of a signed link to a different source agreement.
